ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefit_amount: ₹6,000 per year per family in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each, deposited every 4 months via Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT). 100% Central Government funding. Maximum landholding: up to 2 hectares cultivable land.

ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefit_amount: Claim covers difference between threshold yield and actual yield. Premium: Kharif max 2%, Rabi max 1.5%, commercial/horticultural max 5%. Claims via DBT based on Scale of Finance notified by States.

ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefit_amount: Subsidy of 55% for small/marginal farmers, 45% for others on drip/sprinkler systems. Per acre subsidy varies by crop and equipment.

ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare / Department of Financial Services
department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare / Department of Financial Services
benefit_amount: Credit limit up to ₹3 lakh at 7% per annum. Prompt repayment brings effective rate to 4%. No collateral required up to ₹1.6 lakh. Revolving credit for 5 years.

ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefit_amount: Free soil testing and Soil Health Card every two years. Card contains 12-parameter nutrient status and crop-specific fertilizer guidance. No direct cash benefit.

ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefit_amount: Free online trading platform across 1,000+ registered mandis. Transparent online bidding, direct payments to farmers, zero trading fee.

ministry: Ministry of Rural Development
department: Ministry of Rural Development
benefit_amount: ₹1.20 lakh in plain areas; ₹1.30 lakh in hilly states. Additional ₹12,000 for toilet under Swachh Bharat. Up to 90 days MGNREGA wages (~₹20,000-₹25,000). DBT in 3-4 installments.

ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
department: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefit_amount: Central assistance up to ₹2.5 lakh per EWS beneficiary. EWS income ≤ ₹3 lakh/year; LIG ₹3-6 lakh/year.

name_en: Ayushman Bharat — PM Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY)
name_te: Ayushman Bharat — PM Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY)
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare / National Health Authority
department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare / National Health Authority
benefit_amount: ₹5 lakh/family/year cashless hospitalization at 27,000+ empanelled hospitals. Seniors 70+ get additional ₹5 lakh. No enrollment needed; auto-identified via SECC 2011.

ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
department: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefit_amount: First child: ₹5,000 in two installments. Second child (girl only): ₹6,000 in one installment post-delivery. DBT to Aadhaar-linked bank account.

ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
benefit_amount: Rural BPL (LPS): ₹1,400; Urban BPL (LPS): ₹1,000. High Performing States: Rural ₹700, Urban ₹600. Paid at time of delivery in government facility.

ministry: Ministry of Finance / Department of Posts
department: Ministry of Finance / Department of Posts
benefit_amount: 8.2% per annum interest compounded annually. Min ₹250/year, max ₹1.5 lakh/year. 50% partial withdrawal after girl turns 18 for education. Tax free under Sec 80C.

ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
department: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefit_amount: Awareness, community mobilization, and financial literacy programme. Financial benefit through convergence with Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana.

ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
department: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
benefit_amount: Deposit-free LPG connection including regulator, hose, consumer card, installation. First refill and stove free. ₹300/cylinder subsidy, up to 9 refills/year (max ₹2,700 annually) via DBT.

ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
department: Ministry of Women and Child Development
benefit_amount: One Stop Centres (Sakhi): shelter, legal aid, medical aid, counselling. SHG formation and linkage. Services free of charge to women in distress.

name_en: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (MGNREGS)
name_te: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (MGNREGS)
ministry: Ministry of Rural Development
department: Ministry of Rural Development
benefit_amount: 100 days guaranteed wage employment per household per year. AP/Telangana rate: ₹300/day. Unemployment allowance if work not provided within 15 days. Weekly/fortnightly wages via bank accounts.

ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
department: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
benefit_amount: Certificate + ID card. Basic training (₹500/day stipend). ₹15,000 toolkit via e-voucher. Loan Tranche 1: ₹1 lakh at 5%; Tranche 2: ₹2 lakh at 5%. Digital transaction incentive ₹1/transaction.

name_en: PM SVANidhi (PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi)
name_te: PM SVANidhi (PM Street Vendor's AtmaNirbhar Nidhi)
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
department: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefit_amount: Tranche 1: ₹10,000; Tranche 2: ₹20,000; Tranche 3: ₹50,000. 7% interest subvention quarterly. Digital cashback ₹50-₹100/month.
documents_required: Vendor ID / Certificate of Vending or ULB Recommendation

ministry: Ministry of Finance
department: Ministry of Finance
benefit_amount: Composite loan ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore. 7-year repayment, 18-month moratorium. One SC/ST and one woman beneficiary minimum per bank branch per year.

ministry: Ministry of Finance
department: Ministry of Finance
benefit_amount: Shishu: ₹50,000, zero processing fee. Kishor: ₹5 lakh. Tarun: ₹10 lakh. TarunPlus: ₹20 lakh. MUDRA card for revolving credit.

ministry: Ministry of Education / Department of School Education and Literacy
department: Ministry of Education / Department of School Education and Literacy
benefit_amount: ₹12,000/year (₹1,000/month) via NSP to Aadhaar-linked accounts. Family income ≤ ₹3.5 lakh. 1 lakh scholarships nationally per year.

name_en: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme — CAPF & AR Wards
name_te: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme — CAPF & AR Wards
ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs
department: Ministry of Home Affairs
benefit_amount: ₹3,000/month for wards in professional courses. Min 60% marks in Class 12 required. Up to 5 years duration. 2,000 fresh scholarships per year.

ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / Ministry of Tribal Affairs
department: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / Ministry of Tribal Affairs
benefit_amount: SC: Tuition fee ₹2,000–₹3,000/year + maintenance ₹550–₹1,200/month. OBC: Maintenance ₹300–₹570/month + tuition as applicable.

ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / Ministry of Minority Affairs
department: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / Ministry of Minority Affairs
benefit_amount: Minority (day scholar): ₹1,000–₹1,100/year; Hosteller: ₹2,600–₹3,500/year. SC (Classes 9-10): ₹225–₹525/month maintenance.

name_en: Pradhan Mantri Poshan Shakti Nirman (PM POSHAN)
name_te: Pradhan Mantri Poshan Shakti Nirman (PM POSHAN)
ministry: Ministry of Education / Department of School Education and Literacy
department: Ministry of Education / Department of School Education and Literacy
benefit_amount: Free hot meal every school day. Primary (1-5): 450 kcal + 12g protein. Upper Primary (6-8): 700 kcal + 20g protein. No cash transfer; direct meal at school.

ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
department: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefit_amount: JRF: ₹31,000/month (years 1-2). SRF: ₹35,000/month (years 3-5). Annual contingency: Science ₹12,000 (JRF)/₹25,000 (SRF); Humanities ₹10,000/₹20,000. HRA as per UGC norms.

ministry: Ministry of Finance / Department of Financial Services
department: Ministry of Finance / Department of Financial Services
benefit_amount: Zero-balance account + RuPay Debit Card. Overdraft up to ₹10,000 after 6 months. Accidental insurance ₹2 lakh. Life cover ₹30,000 via PMSBY/PMJJBY linkage. DBT enabled.

ministry: Ministry of Finance / PFRDA
department: Ministry of Finance / PFRDA
benefit_amount: Guaranteed pension ₹1,000/₹2,000/₹3,000/₹4,000/₹5,000 at age 60. Monthly contribution varies by entry age. Spouse continues pension on subscriber's death.

name_en: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
name_te: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
ministry: Ministry of Finance
department: Ministry of Finance
benefit_amount: ₹2 lakh life cover on death from any cause. Annual premium ₹436. Auto-debit June 1. Coverage June 1 to May 31. No medical exam required.

ministry: Ministry of Finance
department: Ministry of Finance
benefit_amount: Accidental death/total disability: ₹2 lakh. Partial disability: ₹1 lakh. Annual premium ₹20. Auto-debit June 1. No medical exam.

ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
department: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
benefit_amount: PHH: 5 kg/person/month free. AAY: 35 kg/household/month free. Distributed via Fair Price Shops under PDS.

name_en: PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana
name_te: PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana
ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
department: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
benefit_amount: 1 kW: ₹30,000; 2 kW: ₹60,000; 3 kW+: ₹78,000. Up to 300 units/month free. Additional ₹17,000–₹18,000/year from surplus power sold to DISCOM. DBT within 30 days.

ministry: Ministry of Communications / Department of Telecommunications
department: Ministry of Communications / Department of Telecommunications
benefit_amount: Zero license fees for PDOs. Citizens get affordable broadband via registered hotspots. No fixed subsidy to end users; benefit is accessible low-cost internet.

name_en: Venture Capital Fund for Scheduled Castes (VCFSC)
name_te: Venture Capital Fund for Scheduled Castes (VCFSC)
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / NSFDC
department: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment / NSFDC
benefit_amount: Soft loan up to ₹15 lakh at 4% per annum. 7-year repayment, 18-month moratorium. No collateral up to ₹10 lakh.

ministry: Department of Agriculture, Government of Telangana
department: Department of Agriculture, Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: ₹6,000/acre/season (Kharif and Rabi), totalling ₹12,000/acre/year. DBT to farmer bank account. No cap on number of acres.

name_en: Rythu Bima (Farmers Group Life Insurance Scheme)
name_te: Rythu Bima (Farmers Group Life Insurance Scheme)
ministry: Department of Agriculture, Government of Telangana / LIC of India
department: Department of Agriculture, Government of Telangana / LIC of India
benefit_amount: ₹5,00,000 lump sum to nominee within 10 days of farmer's death (natural or accidental). Premium fully borne by Telangana government. Zero cost to farmer.

ministry: BC/SC/ST Development Departments, Government of Telangana
department: BC/SC/ST Development Departments, Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: One-time grant of ₹1,00,116 transferred via DBT to bride's bank account at time of marriage.

ministry: Minorities Welfare Department, Government of Telangana
department: Minorities Welfare Department, Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: One-time grant of ₹1,00,116 transferred directly to bride's bank account via DBT at time of marriage.

ministry: Health, Medical and Family Welfare Department, Government of Telangana
department: Health, Medical and Family Welfare Department, Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: ₹4,000 at registration + ₹4,000 at delivery + ₹4,000 at 6-week vaccination = ₹12,000 total. Additional ₹1,000 for girl child (₹13,000 total). Kit of 16 baby/mother care items (worth ~₹15,000).

ministry: Department of Rural Development, Government of Telangana / SERP
department: Department of Rural Development, Government of Telangana / SERP
benefit_amount: Low/subsidised interest loans for livelihood and micro-enterprise. Loan amount varies by SHG grading. 48-hour disbursement. No processing fee.

ministry: Scheduled Castes Development Department, Government of Telangana
department: Scheduled Castes Development Department, Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: ₹10,00,000 one-time capital 100% grant/subsidy. No bank loan linkage, no collateral, no repayment. Beneficiary chooses business from approved list.

name_en: T-PRIDE (Telangana State Programme for Rapid Incubation of Dalit Entrepreneurs)
name_te: T-PRIDE (Telangana State Programme for Rapid Incubation of Dalit Entrepreneurs)
ministry: Department of Industries and Commerce, Government of Telangana
department: Department of Industries and Commerce, Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: 35% investment subsidy (45% for women). 7% interest subsidy. ₹2/unit power cost reimbursement for 5–7 years. 50% land cost rebate. 100% stamp duty reimbursement. SGST reimbursement 5–7 years.

ministry: Panchayati Raj and Rural Development Department, Government of Telangana
department: Panchayati Raj and Rural Development Department, Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: Old Age (57+)/Widow/Single Women/Weavers/Toddy Tappers/HIV patients: ₹4,000/month. Disabled (60%+ SADAREM): ₹6,000/month. Paid 1st–7th of every month via biometric authentication.

ministry: Housing Department, Government of Telangana
department: Housing Department, Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: General: ₹5,00,000; SC/ST: ₹6,00,000 via DBT in 4 stages. Landless families also receive free housing site. Minimum 400 sq ft with RCC roof, kitchen, toilet.

ministry: Energy Department / State Power DISCOMs, Government of Telangana
department: Energy Department / State Power DISCOMs, Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: Zero electricity bill for households consuming ≤200 units/month. Government bears full cost. Consumption above 200 units charged at normal tariff. ~5.1 crore households benefited as of early 2025.

ministry: Welfare Departments (SC/ST/BC/Minorities), Government of Telangana
department: Welfare Departments (SC/ST/BC/Minorities), Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: Full tuition fee reimbursement (Intermediate to PG/Medical). SC/ST: family income ≤₹2 lakh; BC/EBC/Disabled: ≤₹1 lakh. Personal scholarship ₹4,000–₹5,000/year. ₹929 crore disbursed to 7.2 lakh students in 2024–25.

ministry: Welfare Residential Educational Institutions Societies, Government of Telangana
department: Welfare Residential Educational Institutions Societies, Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: Free residential education Classes 5–12. Free boarding, meals, uniforms, books, coaching. No fees charged.

ministry: Scheduled Castes Development / Backward Classes Welfare, Government of Telangana
department: Scheduled Castes Development / Backward Classes Welfare, Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: Up to ₹20,00,000 for tuition and living expenses (as per admission letter or ₹20 lakh, whichever lower). One-way economy air ticket and visa fees included. One student per family. Selection based on merit.

ministry: Revenue Department, Government of Telangana
department: Revenue Department, Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: Direct emergency financial/livelihood support during extreme family crises. Ad-hoc emergency allocations to protect families from destitution.

ministry: Department of Agriculture, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of Agriculture, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: ₹20,000 per year per farmer (₹6,000 Central + ₹14,000 State) in three installments via DBT. Additional seeds, fertilizers, and crop disaster compensation. First installment deposited August 2, 2025.

ministry: Department of Women, Children, Differently Abled and Senior Citizens, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of Women, Children, Differently Abled and Senior Citizens, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Old Age/Widow/Single Women/Weavers/Toddy Tappers/Fishermen/Cobblers/Transgender: ₹4,000/month. Disabled: ₹15,000/month for severely disabled. Rural income ≤₹10,000/month; Urban income ≤₹12,000/month.
documents_required: Category-specific proof (disability certificate, death certificate for widow, etc.)

ministry: School Education Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: School Education Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: ₹15,000/year per child credited directly to mother's/guardian's bank account. Covers all children Class 1 to Intermediate in government, government-aided, and private unaided schools. Minimum 75% child attendance required. Budget: ₹9,400+ crore annually.

ministry: Department of Women, Children, Differently Abled and Senior Citizens, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of Women, Children, Differently Abled and Senior Citizens, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: ₹1,500/month transferred directly to beneficiary's bank account. Aimed at reducing women's financial dependency on family members.

name_en: APSRTC Free Bus Travel for Women (Stree Shakti)
name_te: APSRTC Free Bus Travel for Women (Stree Shakti)
ministry: Transport Department / APSRTC, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Transport Department / APSRTC, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Free travel on all APSRTC buses within AP state boundaries for all women and transgender individuals. No income restriction. Covers approximately 90+ lakh women daily.

name_en: AP Free LPG Cylinders Scheme (3 Free Gas Cylinders)
name_te: AP Free LPG Cylinders Scheme (3 Free Gas Cylinders)
ministry: Civil Supplies Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Civil Supplies Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: 3 free LPG cylinders per year per household. Benefit delivered to women-headed households via DBT coordination with oil marketing companies.

ministry: Housing Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Housing Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Financial assistance up to ₹2.50 lakh per EWS/BPL beneficiary. Payments via DBT in stages based on construction progress. All transactions monitored via APHMS portal.

name_en: NTR Suraksha (AP Health and Life Insurance Scheme)
name_te: NTR Suraksha (AP Health and Life Insurance Scheme)
ministry: Health, Medical and Family Welfare Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Health, Medical and Family Welfare Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: ₹5 lakh/family/year secondary and tertiary hospitalization. ₹5 lakh accidental death/permanent disability cover. ₹2.5 lakh partial disability cover. Auto-enrolled for AP families with annual income < ₹5 lakh. Cashless treatment at all network hospitals.

ministry: Social Welfare Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Social Welfare Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: ₹1,00,000 financial assistance for inter-caste marriage directly to bride's bank account. Bride and groom must be 18+ and 21+ respectively. Both must have passed Class 10.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card of bride and groom

name_en: Shaadi Tohfa Scheme (AP Minority Marriage Assistance)
name_te: Shaadi Tohfa Scheme (AP Minority Marriage Assistance)
ministry: Department of Minority Welfare, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of Minority Welfare, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: ₹75,000 one-time grant to minority community brides at time of marriage via DBT. Bride must be 18+ and groom 21+ years of age.

ministry: Department of Employment and Training, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of Employment and Training, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: ₹3,000/month directly to beneficiary bank account. Available while registered as unemployed. Must be actively seeking employment.

name_en: NTR Vidyonnathi Scheme (Free UPSC/Civil Services Coaching)
name_te: ఎన్.టి.ఆర్. విద్యోన్నతి పథకం (ఉచిత యు.పి.ఎస్.సి/సివిల్ సర్వీసెస్ కోచింగ్)
ministry: Department of Social Welfare / BC Welfare, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of Social Welfare / BC Welfare, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: ₹10,000 in installments for books, stationery, and lodging expenses. Free coaching at empanelled institutes for UPSC/APPSC/Group exams.

ministry: Department of Handlooms and Textiles, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of Handlooms and Textiles, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: ₹25,000/year per handloom family. Free electricity for handloom operations. GST reimbursement. New handloom clusters and market linkage support.
documents_required: Weaver ID Card / Cooperative Society Membership

ministry: Department of Finance, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of Finance, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Accidental death/total disability: ₹5 lakh. Partial disability: ₹2.5 lakh. Premium fully borne by AP state government. Cashless treatment at network hospitals.

ministry: Health, Medical and Family Welfare Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Health, Medical and Family Welfare Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Free comprehensive eye testing. Free spectacles to those with refractive errors. Free eye surgeries (cataract, etc.) at government hospitals. Covers all AP residents regardless of income.
documents_required: AP Ration Card (for free services priority)

name_en: AP Fee Reimbursement Scheme (Jagananna Vidya Deevena / AP Fee Reimbursement)
name_te: AP Fee Reimbursement Scheme (Jagananna Vidya Deevena / AP Fee Reimbursement)
ministry: Department of Higher Education, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of Higher Education, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Full tuition fee reimbursement for approved courses. SC/ST: family income ≤₹2.5 lakh. BC/EBC/Minority: income ≤₹1.5 lakh. Direct credit to student's bank account.

name_en: AP Post Matric Hostels for SC/ST/BC Students
name_te: AP Post Matric Hostels for SC/ST/BC Students
ministry: Department of Social Welfare / Tribal Welfare / BC Welfare, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of Social Welfare / Tribal Welfare / BC Welfare, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Free accommodation, meals, study materials, and utilities for SC/ST/BC/Minority students in government welfare hostels during college study.

ministry: Department of BC Welfare, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of BC Welfare, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Free moped two-wheelers to registered toddy tappers. Advanced palm-tree climbing equipment provided. Benefits targeted at BC, SC, ST, Minority, and BPL occupation groups.

name_en: AP SC Corporation Loans (Ambedkar Loan Scheme)
name_te: AP SC Corporation Loans (Ambedkar Loan Scheme)
ministry: AP State Finance Corporation for SCs / Social Welfare Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: AP State Finance Corporation for SCs / Social Welfare Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Loans at 3–6% concessional interest for self-employment, education, and housing. Loan amount varies by purpose. No collateral for small loans. Repayment period 3–7 years.

name_en: AP ST Corporation Tribal Welfare Loans
name_te: AP ST Corporation Tribal Welfare Loans
ministry: Department of Tribal Welfare / AP Tribal Welfare Residential Educational Institutions Society, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of Tribal Welfare / AP Tribal Welfare Residential Educational Institutions Society, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Concessional loans at 3–5% interest for agriculture, housing, and small business. Skill training and educational grants for tribal youth. ITDA-linked benefits in scheduled areas.

name_en: AP Free Electricity to Farmers Scheme
name_te: AP Free Electricity to Farmers Scheme
ministry: Energy Department / DISCOMS, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Energy Department / DISCOMS, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Free electricity for agricultural pump sets up to 9 hours per day. Farmer must have valid AP agricultural electricity connection. No misuse for commercial purposes permitted.

name_en: AP MSME ReSTART Capital Subsidy Scheme
name_te: AP MSME ReSTART Capital Subsidy Scheme
ministry: Department of Industries and Commerce, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of Industries and Commerce, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Investment subsidy up to 25% on fixed assets. Interest subsidy up to 5% on term loans for 5 years. Power cost reimbursement ₹1.50/unit for 5 years. 100% SGST reimbursement for 5–7 years.

ministry: School Education Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: School Education Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Free school bag, notebooks, stationery, uniforms, and study materials per student per year. Provided at start of each academic year to all eligible government school students.

ministry: Transport Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Transport Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Financial assistance to eligible drivers for insurance premiums, vehicle fitness certificate renewal, and emergency repairs. Exact amount per driver determined by G.O. Ms. No. 33 dated September 13, 2025.

name_en: Jagananna Thodu (Interest-Free Working Capital for Street Vendors)
name_te: Jagananna Thodu (Interest-Free Working Capital for Street Vendors)
ministry: Department of Municipal Administration, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of Municipal Administration, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: ₹10,000 interest-free working capital loan per year. No collateral. Direct credit to bank account.

name_en: AP Micro Irrigation Scheme (APFMIS / State Component)
name_te: AP Micro Irrigation Scheme (APFMIS / State Component)
ministry: Department of Agriculture, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Department of Agriculture, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Additional state subsidy on top of PMKSY central subsidy for drip/sprinkler systems. Subsidized borewells and micro-irrigation for small/marginal farmers. Support through Rythu Bharosa Kendras (RBKs).

ministry: Health, Medical and Family Welfare Department / Aarogyasri Health Care Trust, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Health, Medical and Family Welfare Department / Aarogyasri Health Care Trust, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Cashless treatment for 1,057+ medical procedures at 300+ network hospitals. No premium. BPL/White ration card families auto-enrolled. Covers hospitalizations over ₹1,000.
documents_required: AP White Ration Card / SECC listed

ministry: Department of Women Development and Child Welfare, Government of Telangana
department: Department of Women Development and Child Welfare, Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: Free travel for girls, women, and transgender persons in TSRTC/TGSRTC Palle Velugu and Express buses; LPG cooking gas cylinder at subsidized price of ₹500; financial assistance of ₹2,500 per month for eligible women heads of families.

name_en: Telangana Yuva Vikasam Scheme (Vidya Bharosa Card)
name_te: తెలంగాణ యువ వికాసం విద్యా భరోసా కార్డు
ministry: Higher Education Department, Government of Telangana
department: Higher Education Department, Government of Telangana
benefit_amount: Vidya Bharosa Card worth ₹5,00,000 for students to cover their higher education fees, course fees, hostel accommodation, and study material. Applicable in premier institutes across Telangana and national level centers. Setup of Telangana International Schools in every mandal.

ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
department: Department of Agriculture, Cooperation and Farmers Welfare, Govt of India
benefit_amount: Assured monthly pension of ₹3,000 to small and marginal farmers (SMF) upon attaining 60 years of age. A voluntary and contribution-based pension scheme. Monthly contribution ranges between ₹55 to ₹200 based on entry age.
documents_required: Savings Bank Account details / Jan Dhan Passbook
Land Records / Patta Passbook (up to 2 hectares cultivable land)

ministry: Ministry of Labour and Employment, Government of India
department: Ministry of Labour and Employment, Government of India
benefit_amount: Assured monthly pension of ₹3,00,0 for unorganized workers like street vendors, mid-day meal workers, brick kiln workers, rag pickers, domestic workers, etc., after attaining the age of 60 years. 50:50 matching contribution by Central Government.

name_en: PM-DAKSH (Pradhan Mantri Dakshta Aur Kushalta Sampann Hitgrahi) Yojana
name_te: పీఎం-దక్ష్ (ప్రధాన మంత్రి దక్షత మరియు కుశలత సంపన్న హితగ్రాహి) యోజన
ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of India
department: Department of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of India
benefit_amount: Free skill development training programs (Short Term Training, Up-skilling, Entrepreneurship, Long Term Training) for youth. Stamped stipend of ₹1,000 to ₹1,500 per month for SC, OBC, Safai Karamcharis during training, plus job placement assistance.
documents_required: Income Certificate (< ₹3,00,000 per year for OBC/others)

ministry: Municipal Administration & Urban Development Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Municipal Administration & Urban Development Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Highly subsidized healthy hot meals for poor, workers, students, and citizens. Breakfast, lunch, and dinner are served at an incredibly affordable cost of ₹5 per meal in all major municipality locations across Andhra Pradesh.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card (Optional verification for biometric/token system)

name_en: AP Deepam 2.0 (3 Free Cooking Gas Cylinders Scheme)
name_te: ఏపీ దీపం 2.0 (3 ఉచిత గ్యాస్ సిలిండర్ల పథకం)
ministry: Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
department: Food, Civil Supplies & Consumer Affairs Department, Government of Andhra Pradesh
benefit_amount: Provision of 3 Domestic LPG Refill Gas Cylinders completely free of cost every financial year (one every four months cycle) for women heads of households of Andhra Pradesh possessing a domestic gas connection.
documents_required: State White BPL Ration Card / Food Security Card
Active Domestic Gas Connection Consumer Passbook
